title: Locating Players/Entitys
description: Allows to Locate Players and Entitys Alike.
body:
# Locator

Adds a **'/LocateEntity'** command that tells the **Name, X, Z, and optionally the dimension** the Entity is in.
But the Entity you used the command on gets notified of **Your name, X, Y, Z, and if you optionally picked to see their dimension**, then they also see yours.
